title: aliciella tenuis
intro: Aliciella tenuis, also known as the slender aliciella, is a flowering plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, and is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Aliciella tenuis include its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. Aliciella tenuis can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
